title: Boone County considering moratorium on data center development
description: The Boone County Area Plan Commission discussed the idea at Wednesday’s meeting. They unanimously voted to forward a favorable recommendation for the moratorium to the Boone County Commissioners, who have final approval.

title: Wheaton World Wide Moving launches international division
description:

title: Indianapolis-based Flags for Good becomes official IMS flag supplier
description:
Hundreds of brightly colored flags fly high across the Indianapolis Motor Speedway grounds, and a Hoosier business is now the track's official flag supplier.

title: Bird flu strikes again: Second Indiana outbreak in days sparks emergency controls

title: Indiana high school athletes may now profit off their name, image and likeness
description:
Indiana has joined 46 other states allowing name, image and likeness deals for high school athletes. The Indiana High School Athletic Association Board of Directors approved the new rule Monday in a 13-5 vote.

title: Redistricting return, leadership questions loom after Indiana Senate primary shakeup
description:
The ouster of six senators with nearly a century of General Assembly experience will usher in a group of new lawmakers whom Gov. Mike Braun and other supporters expect will bolster more aggressive action.
